name: Serena
description: LSP-based semantic code toolkit exposed as an MCP server; symbol-level structural retrieval for any agent

developer-org.comment: Built by Oraios AI (oraios GitHub org).

implementation-language.comment: Repo is ~90% Python; installed/run via the serena-agent Python package.

first-release.comment: Repository created March 2025; MCP server first released early April 2025. v1.0.0 followed in 2026.

status.comment: Actively developed; latest release v1.5.x as of mid-2026 (checked 2026-07).

open-source.comment: MIT open source; optional paid JetBrains plugin backend is a separate closed component.

form-factor.comment: Primarily an MCP server; also ships a `serena` CLI (mcp, project index) and an Agno agent integration.

standalone-usable.comment: Generic MCP server usable from any MCP-capable agent/toolchain.

bundled-host.comment: Standalone tool — not welded into a single host agent.

install-mechanism.comment: Recommended install via uv/uvx (Python/pip ecosystem, serena-agent on PyPI); commonly run with `uvx --from git+https://github.com/oraios/serena`; a Docker image is also provided.

retrieval-technique.comment: Core retrieval is LSP-driven symbol/structure lookup (find_symbol, find_referencing_symbols); also offers regex/pattern search (search_for_pattern) for lexical hits. No embeddings.

query-interface.comment: Agents call MCP tools: find_symbol / get_symbols_overview (symbol lookup), search_for_pattern (regex/lexical).

returns.comment: Returns symbol overviews and symbol bodies (code chunks) plus referencing symbols (reference/call relationships).

structural-awareness.comment: Uses language servers (LSP) to operate at the symbol level, respecting real code structure rather than plain text.

chunking-strategy.comment: Operates at the symbol granularity (functions, classes, methods) via LSP; no fixed-size chunking.

reranking.comment: No documented second-stage rerank; results come directly from LSP symbol resolution and pattern matching.

index-location.comment: Runs locally; symbol cache stored under the project's .serena directory. No cloud index.

incremental-updates.comment: `serena project index` pre-computes a symbol cache; the LSP backend re-reads changed files rather than rebuilding everything. Cannot fully confirm per-file cache invalidation from docs.

real-time-watch.comment: No documented persistent file-watcher auto-reindex; the language server refreshes files on access/edit during a session rather than on external saves.

vector-store.comment: No embeddings, so no vector store — retrieval is LSP/AST-based.

embedding-model.comment: n-a — Serena is not an embedding-based tool.

mcp-support.comment: Ships as a native MCP server.

agent-compatibility.comment: Generic MCP server; docs list Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, VSCode, Codex CLI, Copilot CLI among clients. Works with any MCP-capable agent (e.g. Cline, Continue).

ide-integrations.comment: Surfaces via MCP in VSCode/Cursor and terminal CLI agents; optional paid JetBrains plugin backend for JetBrains IDEs.

language-agnostic.comment: Retrieval quality depends on a language server existing for the language; not arbitrary text.

supported-languages.value: 40+ languages via language servers (Python, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, Rust, C/C++, and many more)

code-leaves-machine.comment: Runs locally against local language servers; no source or embeddings are sent to a third-party service by Serena itself (the consuming LLM still sees whatever context the agent passes it).

local-only-option.comment: Fully local — LSP-based, no external embedding API required.

self-hostable.comment: OSS you run yourself; also offers an HTTP/SSE server mode.

telemetry.comment: No usage-telemetry mechanism documented in the repo/docs (checked 2026-07); local OSS tool.

max-repo-scale.comment: Positioned for large, complex codebases; LSP-backed symbol retrieval scales to large repos but is not marketed as monorepo-scale search infrastructure.

pricing-model.comment: Free/OSS core (MIT). Optional JetBrains plugin backend is a separate paid add-on with a free trial.

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: Core is free; only the optional JetBrains plugin backend is paid.

maturity.comment: Past v1.0, widely adopted (~26k stars) and stable, but still actively evolving.

active-maintenance.comment: Releases within the last 90 days (v1.5.x mid-2026); checked 2026-07-09.

community-size.comment: RESEARCH.md anchors Serena as medium; ~26.3k GitHub stars indicate a sizeable and growing community.
